product: Lakeflow Pipelines Editor is now in public preview
tagline: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor (previously called the multi file editor) is now in public preview.
what_it_does: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor (previously called the multi file editor) is now in public preview. The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor shows a pipeline as a set of files in the pipeline asset browser. You can edit the files and control the configuration of the pipeline and which files to include in one location.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor (previously called the multi file editor) is now in public preview. The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor shows a pipeline as a set of files in the pipeline asset browser.
